name: Rand Paul
subject: Have we lost already?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)
---
Peter,

The Kentucky primary results are in the books -- _I now have an official Obama-Clinton Democrat challenger for the U.S. Senate_ \-- **and we've already fallen behind.**

Please let me explain: With the backing of the Washington Democrat establishment, my opponent, a self-funded liberal mayor, _is already winning the critical fundraising battle by a factor of more than two and a half times_ \-- **amassing an almost $2 million war chest** \-- including a $1 million loan to himself!

**Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and Harry Reid now have their hand-picked candidate, pledging to do whatever it takes to defeat me and take over the United States Senate.**

Make no mistake -- if Democrats defeat me in Kentucky -- the national Democrats will surely reclaim control of the U.S. Senate.

**[That's why I'm asking you to make an emergency, instant contribution to my campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)** I've had my staff put together secure, instant donate links below. It will take you only a few moments.

**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452757:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $35](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452758:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452759:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452760:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452761:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate Other Amount](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
Peter, I simply don't have anywhere else to turn. My fate this November -- **and control of the United States Senate** \-- is now in great jeopardy. Here's what's at stake:
_
* Confirmation - or rejection - of the next Supreme Court Justice
* 2nd Amendment freedoms, which are hanging by a thread
* The congressional push to finally audit the Federal Reserve
* Working to end unnecessary and counterproductive foreign aid
* Protecting Americans' increasingly endangered Constitutional rights
* Reforming the outrageous U.S. tax code and lowering taxes for everybody...
_
**[That's why I urgently need your help to close the gap with my Obama-Clinton Democrat opponent -- and why I'm asking you to make a special, emergency contribution in the next 48 hours!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**

Peter, you know you can count on me to lead the fight for commonsense, liberty-minded conservative reform in Washington, D.C. -- can I count on your immediate **[48 hour emergency contribution of $10, $35, $50, or even $100 or more to help erase my opponent's huge fundraising advantage and get back in this race?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**

I need you to take action immediately -- **_[please respond now -- the clock is ticking!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)_**

Sincerely,

Rand Paul

PS -- Peter, I need your immediate help in this race before my opponent's campaign cash advantage puts victory out of reach. **[Please step forward with your urgent 48 hour contribution today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)** Thanks, Rand

**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452757:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $35](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452758:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452759:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452760:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452761:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**
**[Save the Senate >> Instant Donate Other Amount](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/35452756:WpXxV1YIN:m:1:1320601823:1632BC309719D816C1CA4C21B4705B6B:r)**

| Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

name: John Gregg
subject: Honoring those who serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
We must continue to do more for our Airmen, Soldiers, Sailors, Coast Guardsmen, and Marines and their families -- both as they serve and after.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8312971359088670720/-8012609023175686144?utm_campaign=engg_armfrc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160520enggarmfrcgqfuljg&refcode=em16160520enggarmfrcgqfuljg)
---
Peter, There's a chain that goes back to the very beginning -- a chain of patriots who've defended this nation and our freedoms. Today, on Armed Forces Day, we honor those who carry that chain forward as they serve in each branch of the military today. But to truly honor them, we must continue to do more for our Airmen, Soldiers, Sailors, Coast Guardsmen, and Marines and their families -- both as they serve and after. Indiana has fallen far behind other states in providing veterans with the benefits and support they deserve. We now rank 46th in the nation for veterans receiving the benefits they have earned and a recent survey ranked Indiana last in the county for military retirees. These brave Hoosiers, who have served and continue to serve our nation, deserve better. [**I recently wrote an article for Indiana newspapers outlining some of my ideas for addressing these issues that you can read here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8312971359088670720/-8012609023175686144?utm_campaign=engg_armfrc_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160520enggarmfrcgqfuljg&refcode=em16160520enggarmfrcgqfuljg) It's only the beginning of a much longer conversation Hoosier leaders must have and will have when I'm governor. But today, on Armed Forces Day, I simply want to offer my deepest thanks to those who have served and those who continue to serve in our military today. I look forward to working for you and your families. Sincerely, John Gregg

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8312971359088670720/-7940551429137758208) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8312971359088670720/-7868493835099830272)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8312971359088670720/-8084666617213614080).

subject: FLORIDA "SENATE RACE IS WIDE OPEN"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2387/738133e4/35305c70/7f82791c/3051102348/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160521?refcode=pme160521_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| **NEW POLL: "THE [FLORIDA] SENATE RACE IS WIDE OPEN"!**
\-- _Politico_ , 5/20/16 Team -- A new poll of our race came out today and get this: the margin is just 19% to 16%.

**We 're only up by 3 points, and a HUGE majority of voters is still undecided.** As _Politico_ reports, "with numbers like that, the [Florida] Senate race is wide open." **This could slip away from us at ANY MOMENT.**

National Republicans ALREADY have ads up against us. The Koch brothers are getting ready to invest. We CAN'T let their misleading smears drown us out, or there will be no going back.

_It 's up to you, right now_: Do you want the undecided voters to be fooled by GOP lies, or do you want them to hear about how we can win this race and retake Rubio's seat and the Senate?

**Pitch in before it 's too late >>** | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2387/738133e4/35305c70/7f82791d/3051102348/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160521?refcode=pme160521_m&recurring=true&amount=3")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Join me for dinner with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I wanted you to be the first to know about this exciting event. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Friend -- I am excited to share this news with you. On Friday, June 24th, **President Barack Obama** will be coming to Seattle for a dinner to support my re-election campaign. **You have been an incredible supporter throughout my campaign, and I hope that you will continue that support by joining Trudi and me at this great fundraising event on June 24**. Silver level tickets are $250. | [**RSVP »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
[_**Or, if you can 't attend, contribute to the campaign -- in honor of President Obama's visit -- right here.**_](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
I am honored to welcome President Obama back to Washington and look forward to sharing this experience with you.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**RSVP »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
**P.S. You can also sign up to serve as a table captain and have an opportunity to be in a photograph with President Obama himself.**
By signing up to serve as a table captain, you commit to selling ten seats for this exciting dinner. You can either recruit your friends and colleagues to purchase tickets individually, or purchase the table yourself.
[**Don 't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity -- step up to serve as a table captain now: **](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[**SIGN UP »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=ODk1Mzg1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTIyMDQ4NDUxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Unacceptable contamination
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I'm committed to protecting clean, healthy drinking water. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema") Friend, A recent study found that 34 percent of tested groundwater wells in Kewaunee County in Northeastern Wisconsin contained water that was unsafe to drink. **That's one in every three wells.** As a nation, we were awakened to the threat that unsafe water poses to a community when tragedy struck Flint, Michigan. That's why I've made it a priority to hear about Wisconsinites' concerns about water firsthand. **[Nobody should have to worry about whether or not they have access to safe, potable water -- this is unacceptable. Will you sign my petition calling for safe and clean drinking water? Add your name here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d6/2447526851/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/clean-water?utm_source=ema_2016-05-18_cleanwater&source=ema_2016-05-18_cleanwater&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d6/2447526851/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/clean-water?utm_source=ema_2016-05-18_cleanwater&source=ema_2016-05-18_cleanwater&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema") Groundwater can be contaminated by sewage, septic waste, and certain agricultural operations. As community members and neighbors, we need to support efforts from county officials, local officials, and businesses to come together to keep our water safe and clean. We deserve a federal government that will partner with county and local officials, and together, they must urge state officials to act fairly and take the issue of clean water seriously. _But my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, isn't listening._ Despite the fact that many of Wisconsin's wells are contaminated and many stakeholders are concerned, he called enhanced water protections "ludicrous" and thinks we should be doing _less_ to ensure that our families have safe drinking water. That line might play in the boardroom with big corporations, but it doesn't even come close to addressing the growing concerns of the people. We need thoughtful cooperation at all levels of the government to address the urgent concern of groundwater contamination. **[Clean water is essential to a healthy community and local economy --](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema")****[I need your voice in this.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema")****[Will you add your name in support of clean water today?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema")** It's time we abide by a simple truth: Our shared prosperity is dependent on the health of our land. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ae/1c469400/560dcd2/35638d9/2447526851/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/cleanwater?utm_source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&source=ema_2016-05-20_cleanwater_nat&utm_campaign=cleanwater&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: I'm committed to protecting clean, healthy drinking water. | "" Friend, A recent study found that 34 percent of tested groundwater wells in Kewaunee County in Northeastern Wisconsin contained water that was unsafe to drink. That's one in every three wells. As a nation, we were awakened to the threat that unsafe water poses to a community when tragedy struck Flint, Michigan. That's why I've made it a priority to hear about Wisconsinites' concerns about water firsthand. "" "" "" Groundwater can be contaminated by sewage, septic waste, and certain agricultural operations. As community members and neighbors, we need to support efforts from county officials, local officials, and businesses to come together to keep our water safe and clean. We deserve a federal government that will partner with county and local officials, and together, they must urge state officials to act fairly and take the issue of clean water seriously. But my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, isn't listening. Despite the fact that many of Wisconsin's wells are contaminated and many stakeholders are concerned, he called enhanced water protections "ludicrous" and thinks we should be doing less to ensure that our families have safe drinking water. That line might play in the boardroom with big corporations, but it doesn't even come close to addressing the growing concerns of the people. We need thoughtful cooperation at all levels of the government to address the urgent concern of groundwater contamination. "" "" "" It's time we abide by a simple truth: Our shared prosperity is dependent on the health of our land. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | ""

name: Erica Smegielski
subject: Will you add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
My mom died at Sandy Hook. | Friend --

When I woke up on December 14th, 2012, I had no idea that I would never see my mom again, never hear her laugh or spend another afternoon together planning my wedding. But my mom was the principal at Sandy Hook School. And on that day, a gunman walked into her school and killed her as she tried to protect the children in her care.

Today, the best way I can think to honor my mom is to do everything I can to make sure no other family has to go through what we did. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to make sure Hillary is our next president -- I know she’s the only candidate in this race who isn’t afraid to stand up to the NRA and do what it takes to prevent gun violence.

**[Will you add your name to stand with Hillary and me to pledge to do everything we can to take on the NRA and enact sensible gun violence prevention?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1NDgxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjgwMDkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Yesterday, Donald Trump spoke at the NRA’s convention. Trump promises to mandate that every school in America allow guns in classrooms, and he thinks the best way to prevent school shootings is to arm our teachers.

My mom wasn’t a soldier on the front lines of a war. She was an educator doing her best to help kids grow up happy, healthy, and safe.

Our laws failed my mom in Newtown -- they failed her kids, too. But I know Hillary won’t fail us when it comes to making this country safer. I’m so proud to be on her team, and I’m glad you are, too. I know that together, we can win this election -- we have to. Families like mine are counting on you.

**Will you add your name today to show Donald Trump and everyone at the NRA convention that we’re not afraid of them, and we’re going to fight as hard as it takes to win this election and take action to prevent gun violence?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU1NDgxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjgwMDkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for being part of this, and for helping to honor my mom’s memory. It means more to me than you know.

Erica

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1NDgxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjgwMDkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1NDgxNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjgwMDkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Team -- With the potential for a President Trump to nominate FOUR justices to the Supreme Court, Elizabeth Warren said it best: "The stakes for a Democratic Senate have never been higher."
Maggie's race in New Hampshire could easily decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court. And it will determine whether Granite Staters like you are stuck with another six years of a Senator who repeatedly sides with her party leadership and corporate special interests, or if you'll have Maggie Hassan, a leader who will ALWAYS put hard-working families first, representing you in Washington.
That's why we're setting a $40,000 goal for our Secure the Supreme Court fund for our campaign. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Will you stand with Hillary and me against the NRA?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Taking on the gun lobby: | Friend --

On January 8th, 2011, a man stood three feet away from me in a grocery store parking lot, aimed a gun at my head, and pulled the trigger. I survived. But six innocent lives were taken that day, including a 9-year-old girl.

I don’t get angry about what happened to me. But I am angry that so many Americans die every year because our leaders refuse to do more to keep guns out of the wrong hands and reduce gun violence.

Yesterday, Donald Trump addressed the NRA’s national convention -- that crowd cheered his every word, but now it’s our turn to show that we're all standing with Hillary to make our communities safer from gun violence. **[Will you add your name to show you're with us?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The gun lobby has repeatedly blocked commonsense reforms like strengthening our life-saving background check system and holding irresponsible gun dealers accountable when they break the law. They have a lot of power in Washington -- I saw that in Congress. But I know this team is strong enough to beat them if we work together.

**So join Hillary and me in this fight. Add your name to stand with us and stand up to the gun lobby -- let’s fight together to make Americans safer:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Gabby

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU1NDgzNTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAzMjg4NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Taking on the gun lobby: | Friend -- On January 8th, 2011, a man stood three feet away from me in a grocery store parking lot, aimed a gun at my head, and pulled the trigger. I survived. But six innocent lives were taken that day, including a 9-year-old girl. I don’t get angry about what happened to me. But I am angry that so many Americans die every year because our leaders refuse to do more to keep guns out of the wrong hands and reduce gun violence. Yesterday, Donald Trump addressed the NRA’s national convention -- that crowd cheered his every word, but now it’s our turn to show that we're all standing with Hillary to make our communities safer from gun violence. The gun lobby has repeatedly blocked commonsense reforms like strengthening our life-saving background check system and holding irresponsible gun dealers accountable when they break the law. They have a lot of power in Washington -- I saw that in Congress. But I know this team is strong enough to beat them if we work together. So join Hillary and me in this fight. Add your name to stand with us and stand up to the gun lobby -- let’s fight together to make Americans safer: Thank you, Gabby | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her: | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Four ways to help Bernie win California
body:
#
Bernie Supporter:
A massive haul of **475 pledged delegates** will be up for grabs in California's June 7th election. We hope to win a big majority of those.
Since this is a people-powered campaign, we're asking for your help - in any of the following four ways - to do that!
1\. **[Call some California voters now.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank/")** We're working to get as many Californians as possible registered to vote for Bernie before the voter registration deadline this Monday. Lots of voters - even those in other parties - are looking for the strongest candidate to beat Trump, and polls **consistently** show that that's Bernie.
**[Make calls to California now](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank/")**
2\. **[Sign up to call California voters later.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160521-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160521-full")** Since California offers online voter registration, we'll be making calls right up through the deadline Monday evening. And every voter we can register, or re-register as a Democrat (or "no party preference"), is another potential vote for Bernie.
**[Sign up to make some calls later](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160521-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/get-california-registered?source=em160521-full")**
3\. **[Share our California voter registration page on Facebook.](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://berniesanders.com/california-register-vote/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://berniesanders.com/california-register-vote/")** If you have friends in California, tag them and ask them to spread the word too. Voter registration numbers are already trending up this year in the Golden State, so let's keep that momentum going!
**[Share on facebook and tag some friends](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://berniesanders.com/california-register-vote/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://berniesanders.com/california-register-vote/")**
4\. **[Contribute to support our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160521-call-CA-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160521-call-CA-full")** We don't take money from super PACs, and have shocked the political establishment by showing that Americans just like you are eager and ready to fund a grassroots campaign that's **not** beholden to wealthy donors. Your donation will help keep our political revolution rolling all the way into the Democratic convention in July.
**[Contribute to support our campaign](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160521-call-CA-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets_go_bernie?refcode=em160521-call-CA-full")**
**We're staying in this fight all the way to the convention, because we know that Bernie is the strongest candidate to beat Trump in the fall.** Every state we win and every vote we earn strengthens our hand in delivering that message at the convention in Philadelphia, and signals to the political establishment that we will not accept the status quo of a corrupt political system that holds in place a rigged economy.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
